title: Become an AI Native Cloud Engineer
summary: AWS Developers argues that junior cloud engineers should focus on fundamentals like security, reliability, cost, and maintainability rather than coding alone, since AI agents can now generate Kubernetes manifests, Terraform modules, and CI/CD pipelines. The video emphasizes understanding what to build and why, positioning AI as a tool to accelerate implementation rather than replace engineering judgment.
